name: ruined-watchtower
summary: The ground floor of a collapsed border watchtower. Partial walls, exposed to the sky, debris from upper floors strewn across the floor.

primary_palette.note: the stair up is broken — access to the tower's upper floors impossible or climb-DC
cold watchfire, site where guards once warmed hands
previous occupant — centerpiece of the tragedy

story_prompts: fell to bandits a decade ago, never reclaimed
abandoned after the border shifted — nothing dramatic, just irrelevant
struck by magic — one wall fused to glass, corpses in peculiar positions
reclaimed by a scout party as a temporary camp, rope up to the broken second floor
anti_patterns: at least one wall should be partially broken — use short wall runs, not full enclosure
rubble concentrated under where upper floors were — not evenly scattered
no pristine surviving furniture — everything is damaged or repurposed
